name: Gedunstetes Weisskraut (Skillet Cabbage)
recipeInstructions:
1. Heat the oil in a large frying pan about 20 minutes before serving time.
2. Add the ingredients and cook over medium to low heat for about 15 minutes, stirring frequently.
3. Cover the pan during the last 5 minutes of cooking time.
4. Stir once or twice at the end of cooking.
5. Serve immediately. The vegetables will remain crisp.
